title: Asthma action plan documentation

red_flags.text: Supports review of symptoms, time off work or school, reliever use, systemic steroid courses, admissions or emergency attendance, validated control questionnaires, peak flow, FeNO, adherence, inhaler technique, smoking or vaping, occupational, psychosocial, seasonal and environmental factors, and response to treatment change.
red_flags.rationale: Supports asthma-control monitoring for asthma action-plan documentation; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports review of symptoms, time off work or school, reliever use, systemic steroid courses, admissions or emergency attendance, validated control questionnaires, peak flow, FeNO, adherence, inhaler technique, smoking or vaping, occupational, psychosocial, seasonal and environmental factors, and response to treatment change.

source.title: Asthma: diagnosis, monitoring and chronic asthma management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.5.1–1.6.4 — monitoring asthma control and uncontrolled asthma

medication.text: Supports inhaler-technique and adherence review at every review and clinician-documented personalised action-plan and trigger discussion without mapping medicine names or doses.
medication.rationale: Supports inhaler technique, adherence and personalized action plans for asthma action-plan documentation; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports inhaler-technique and adherence review at every review and clinician-documented personalised action-plan and trigger discussion without mapping medicine names or doses.

source.title: Asthma: diagnosis, monitoring and chronic asthma management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.11.1 and 1.14.1–1.14.2 — inhaler technique, adherence, and action plans

referral.text: Supports review of alternative or comorbid causes, adherence, inhaler technique, smoking, occupational, psychosocial and environmental factors, treatment response, device review, and clinician-led referral.
referral.rationale: Supports uncontrolled-asthma review and referral context for asthma action-plan documentation; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports review of alternative or comorbid causes, adherence, inhaler technique, smoking, occupational, psychosocial and environmental factors, treatment response, device review, and clinician-led referral.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Diagnosis, usual control, medicines, reliever use, peak flow, triggers, warning zones, actions, emergency contacts, education and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for asthma action-plan documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
